title: Rift
notes: The game launches, but most textures are black, hence the "unplayable"

title: Rift
notes: Game loads however graphics are mostly black making the game unplayable

title: RIFT
notes: While it does launch, lighting seems not to work at all (all models look pitch black), and enabling PostFX in the graphic options makes the whole screen minus the UI black. According to WineHQ, it works, so it may be a Proton or DXVK bug.

title: Rift
notes: Lighting is non existent all textures render pitch black.

Solved black screen via using winetricks d3dcompiler_43 d3dx9_43 . There are still a number of issues though, first the launcher crashes upon trying to change server, this can be worked around by editing GlyphClient.cfg and changing depots from US to EU or vice versa. Second is that there still might be some graphics bugs in some cases although it is generally playable.
title: RIFT

notes: Game loads fine, but everything is black.  I can see the sky, name tags, and special effects.  Buildings, terrain, and characters, however, are solid black.
